name: Rice & Malt
description: Traditional rice-based health drink mixes and natural malt beverages for daily strength and wellness.

name: Flours
description: Stone-milled heritage rice flours for puttu, idiyappam, kozhukattai and traditional kali.

name: Soup & Health Mix
description: Traditional nutritious soup mixes blended with native rice, pulses and warming spices.

name: Cookies
description: Crispy, naturally nutritious cookies made with traditional rice and natural ingredients — no maida, no white sugar, no preservatives.

name: Vadam & Vathal
description: Sun-dried traditional vadam and vathal made the authentic homemade way for crispy meal accompaniments.
